name: Torpedoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Separate the bagelettes and place them on a baking sheet.
3. Spread each half with an ample amount of Dijon mustard.
4. Place a thin slice of onion on top.
5. Add a thick slice of cheese, then sprinkle with paprika.
6. Bake until the cheese is melted and begins to brown.
7. Make plenty as they disappear quickly!
